backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend with user profiles, mood entries, journal entries, testimonials, events, meeting links, and auth tokens, using access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Trivial data migration module with a no-op run function that passes through an empty state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs (Goals & Progress page, Trophies page, goal progress integration) to their implementing files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, hooks, components, and styling for the app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app titled 'I'm Fine', loading Lato and Playpen Sans fonts from Google Fonts and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing hash-based routing across all app pages, authentication state, plan-based redirects, and a TrophyNotificationWatcher that fires toast notifications when new trophies are earned.
frontend/src/components/ai-friend/aiFrie: Exports a centralized constant object mapping AI friend asset names (idle, walk, avatar) to their image file paths.
frontend/src/components/ai-friend/AIFrie: Fixed-position clickable character button that preloads idle and walk sprite images and renders the Seth AI assistant icon in the bottom-right corner.

A modal chat panel component for the AI assistant 'Seth' that handles user messages, generates responses, supports English/Spanish language switching, and includes a product suggestion submission form.
A React context provider for the AI Friend feature that exposes open/close state, but currently has the UI disabled via a kill-switch with no-op handlers.
frontend/src/components/ai-friend/aiFrie: Implements deterministic response generation for the AI assistant by matching user input against keyword patterns (crisis, greetings, tools, journal, resources, etc.) and returning structured responses with deep links and suggested actions.
frontend/src/components/ai-friend/crisis: Provides keyword-based crisis detection by checking user input against a list of English and Spanish crisis-related phrases, and returns an appropriate bilingual crisis response message.
frontend/src/components/ai-friend/i18n.t: Defines a bilingual (English/Spanish) translation dictionary for the AI friend UI strings and exports a helper function to retrieve translations by language and key.
frontend/src/components/ai-friend/respon: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the AI assistant's response structure, including AssistantResponse, SuggestedAction, and DeepLink.
frontend/src/components/ai-friend/safety: Exports bilingual (English/Spanish) safety disclaimer and crisis messaging constants used throughout the AI friend UI, along with the Language type.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name during onboarding and saves the profile using the useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/billing/PaidPlan: A multi-step checkout modal that handles paid plan selection confirmation, disclosure agreement, payment processing, and a post-payment newsletter opt-in step before logging the user out.
frontend/src/components/branding/BrandLo: A simple responsive image component that renders the I'm Fine brand logo at configurable small, medium, or large sizes.
frontend/src/components/content/External: A card component that displays an external link item with its title, description, source, and an anchor tag that opens the URL in a new tab.
frontend/src/components/content/InAppRes: A dialog component that displays the full in-app text content of a ResourceItem in a scrollable view with title, description, and source attribution.
frontend/src/components/content/InfoSect: Renders a card displaying a community info section with a title, description, bullet-point content list, and optional external resource links.
frontend/src/components/content/MediaLin: Renders a card for a media item (video/podcast) showing title, description, source, optional duration, and an external link to watch or listen.
frontend/src/components/content/Resource: Renders a card for a resource item that either links externally via URL or triggers an in-app view callback when no URL is present.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Displays a dashboard card showing mood-tracking metrics including current streak, entries this week, and total check-ins calculated from mood history.
frontend/src/components/goals/GoalCard.t: Renders a goal card with progress bar, completion status badge, and appropriate icons distinguishing streak goals from standard target goals.
frontend/src/components/GreenButton.tsx: Reusable button component that wraps shadcn Button with consistent primary green styling via className merging.
frontend/src/components/journal/JournalE: Provides a form card for creating or editing a journal entry with title and content fields, using add/update mutation hooks on submit.
frontend/src/components/journal/JournalL: Fetches and lists journal entries with edit and delete (with confirmation dialog) actions for each entry.
frontend/src/components/journal/JournalS: Manages journal UI state to toggle between the entry list view and the editor for creating or editing entries.
frontend/src/components/landing/FAQSecti: Renders a FAQ accordion section on the landing page with answers to common questions about therapy replacement, data safety, anonymity, cancellation, and app differentiation.
frontend/src/components/landing/FeatureA: Displays two landing sections: a grid of feature cards (journals, grounding, confidence plans, etc.) and a benefits list highlighting outcomes users can expect.
frontend/src/components/landing/HeroSect: Renders the landing page hero with a personal, empathetic headline and supporting copy aimed at trauma survivors, with no CTA button.
frontend/src/components/landing/LandingC: A reusable CTA button component that triggers Internet Identity login when clicked, showing a loading state while signing in.
frontend/src/components/landing/LandingH: Sticky landing page header with the brand logo, a navigation dropdown, and a sign-up button that triggers Internet Identity login.
frontend/src/components/landing/LandingS: A simple layout wrapper component that renders a full-width section with consistent padding and a centered max-width container.
frontend/src/components/landing/PricingS: Displays three pricing plan cards (Demo, Basic, Premier) with feature lists and CTA buttons that either navigate authenticated users to account settings or trigger login.
frontend/src/components/landing/PrivacyS: Landing section highlighting privacy and safety features (encryption, no ads, anonymous use) with a crisis safety notice and a disclaimer that the app does not replace professional care.
frontend/src/components/landing/SocialPr: Renders a social proof section with three user testimonial cards and empathetic supporting copy to reassure visitors they are not alone.
frontend/src/components/landing/ValuePro: Renders the 'About' landing section with an emotional headline and a 4-card grid highlighting key differentiators: trauma-aware tools, judgment-free support, emotional safety, and privacy.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppFooter: Renders the app footer with navigation buttons (Legal, Business, About Me) using hash-based routing and a copyright line with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Provides the authenticated app shell with a sticky header (brand logo, nav dropdown, user name, sign-out button), a main content area, and a footer, wrapped in the sanctuary background.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sanctuary: Wraps children in a fixed beach-image background with a semi-transparent overlay for readability, used as the main authenticated app background.
frontend/src/components/layout/SplashBac: Wraps children in a fixed powder-pink clouds background image with a semi-transparent overlay, used as the unauthenticated splash/landing background.
frontend/src/components/mood/MoodCheckIn: Card component that lets users select and save a mood (happy/neutral/sad) via mutation hooks and displays the 5 most recent mood check-in entries with timestamps.
frontend/src/components/navigation/Heade: Renders a Select-based navigation dropdown listing all app routes, calling the parent's onNavigate callback when a route is selected.
frontend/src/components/playbook/course-: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the course builder: CourseInput (user-provided fields), CourseSynopsis (generated summary), and CourseFileOutput (file name + content pairs).
Exports a pure function that deterministically generates a CourseSynopsis object from a CourseInput by constructing learning outcomes and an overview string.
Parses and validates a course duration string (hours/days/weeks), returning an error if the value is outside the 1-hour to 8-week allowed range.
Generates an array of five course document files (syllabus, timeline, teacher script, worksheets, student workbook) as text content, and provides a helper to encode text to Uint8Array bytes.
Provides functions to generate plain-text content for five course PDF documents (syllabus, timeline, teacher script, worksheets, student workbook) based on a course synopsis and module list.
frontend/src/components/tools/BreathingT: Implements a guided 4-4-6-2 breathing exercise timer that cycles through inhale/hold/exhale/rest phases and records goal progress after three completed cycles.
frontend/src/components/tools/Entitlemen: Renders a card for a tool that shows locked, coming-soon, or available states based on the user's plan level compared to the required plan.
frontend/src/components/tools/Grounding5: Implements the 5-4-3-2-1 sensory grounding exercise as a multi-step form with optional text responses, recording goal progress upon completion.
frontend/src/components/tools/ThoughtRef: Guides users through a CBT thought-reframing exercise by capturing a negative thought, displaying reframing prompts, and recording goal progress when a reframed thought is submitted.
frontend/src/components/trophies/TrophyB: Displays a trophy badge card with its image, title, description, earned date, and an optional discount code copy button; supports a locked/greyed-out state with an unlock hint.
frontend/src/components/trophies/TrophyE: A toast notification component that animates in from the bottom-right when a trophy is earned, displays the trophy badge image and details, and auto-dismisses after 6 seconds.
frontend/src/content/catalog/communityRe: Exports an array of community guidance sections covering topics like finding support groups, online safety, peer support expectations, crisis resources, and red flags in communities.
frontend/src/content/catalog/helpfulLink: Exports curated arrays of external links organized into crisis resources, mental health organizations, and educational resources with titles, descriptions, URLs, and sources.
frontend/src/content/catalog/index.ts: Re-exports all public types and data from the content catalog modules (helpfulLinks, videosMusic, resourcesPdfs, communityResources, and types).
frontend/src/content/catalog/resourcesPd: Exports arrays of worksheet/exercise resources and guides/handbooks, each with titles, descriptions, and either external URLs or inline app content for mental health self-help tools.
frontend/src/content/catalog/types.ts: Defines shared TypeScript interfaces for content catalog items: LinkItem, MediaItem, ResourceItem, and CommunityInfoSection.
frontend/src/content/catalog/videosMusic: Exports arrays of self-help video links and calming music/ambient sound video links, each with metadata including title, description, URL, source, and duration.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCouponCode.ts: A React hook that fetches the user's coupon code from the backend actor and exposes a mutation to save a new coupon code, both managed via React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Provides hooks to fetch the current user's profile (`useGetCallerUserProfile`) and save it (`useSaveCallerUserProfile`) via React Query, invalidating the cached profile on save.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoals.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching user goals, creating goals, updating goal progress, and recording tool usage, with cache invalidation for goals and trophies on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout state, identity, and helper status flags via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useJournal.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on journal entries (get, add, update, delete), invalidating related goals and trophies caches when entries are added.
frontend/src/hooks/useMood.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch mood history and add a new mood entry, invalidating mood, goals, and trophies caches on successful mood submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useNewsletterOptIn.ts: Provides a mutation hook to toggle the user's newsletter opt-in preference, invalidating the current user profile cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlan.ts: Exposes the user's selected subscription plan, its effective level (accounting for expiration), and mutations to select a plan or record a payment, derived from the user profile.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlaybookAuth.ts: Manages playbook-specific session authentication using a token stored in sessionStorage, with login, logout, token validation on mount, and periodic keep-alive pings.
Provides React Query hooks for managing playbook workspace resources (PDF files, calendar events, meeting links, and password changes), all gated by a session token.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductSuggestions: Provides hooks to submit a new product suggestion and list all existing product suggestions via React Query mutations and queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch all testimonials and submit a new testimonial, invalidating the testimonials cache on successful submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrophies.ts: Provides a React Query hook to fetch the current user's trophies by principal, enabled only when the actor and identity are available.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines a calm sanctuary-themed design system with CSS custom properties for light and dark modes, covering colors, radius, and chart variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityResourcesPag: Page displaying community resource guidance sections from a content catalog, with a 24/7 crisis support safety notice and a closing encouragement card.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page showing mood check-in, journal, tracker, and a summary of features available under the user's current plan with an upgrade prompt for free-tier users.
frontend/src/pages/GoalsProgressPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays the user's therapy milestone goals and wellness streak goals in separate sections, with loading skeletons and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page that composes hero, value proposition, features, pricing, FAQ, and privacy sections within a sanctuary background layout, with optional header/footer visibility.
frontend/src/pages/LegalPage.tsx: Legal information page presenting Terms of Service, privacy policy, and other legal sections via accordions, along with a crisis support disclaimer card.
frontend/src/pages/LinksPage.tsx: Curated external resources page organized into sections for crisis resources, mental health organizations, educational materials, and support communities, each rendered as link cards.
frontend/src/pages/MyAccountPage.tsx: User account settings page that allows editing profile info (name, DOB, city, email, phone), managing a journal PIN, toggling newsletter opt-in, applying coupon codes, and selecting/upgrading subscription plans with a checkout modal.
frontend/src/pages/ProgramDirectorPlaybo: Password-protected admin playbook page for program directors, supporting PDF uploads, event management, meeting link management, password changes, and a course builder that generates PDF course files.
frontend/src/pages/ResourcesPdfsPage.tsx: Displays categorized downloadable resources (worksheets, guides, educational materials, templates) as cards with an in-app viewer modal for previewing selected items.
frontend/src/pages/SplashPage.tsx: Login/landing page with a username/password form that delegates authentication to Internet Identity, plus placeholder biometric and forgot-password options that show an unsupported message.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Public testimonials page that displays existing user testimonials and provides a form to submit new ones, with an optional standalone layout including a header and footer.
frontend/src/pages/ToolsPage.tsx: Renders the Self-Help Tools page with tabbed access to Breathing, Grounding, and Thought Reframing tools, gating each behind plan entitlements and showing a prompt if no plan is selected.
frontend/src/pages/TrophiesPage.tsx: Displays a user's earned and locked achievement trophies using predefined templates, showing unlock hints for locked badges and progress counts.
frontend/src/pages/VideosMusicPage.tsx: Renders a curated media library page with sections for self-help videos, music videos, guided meditations, and educational series using MediaLinkCard components.
frontend/src/utils/plan.ts: Defines plan tier types, display options, helper functions for plan level/label lookup, and a full feature entitlement catalog mapping features to required plan levels.
frontend/src/utils/time.ts: Provides utility functions to format nanosecond BigInt timestamps into MM/DD/YYYY strings and to check whether a timestamp has expired.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup helpers.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Exports a validateDateOfBirth function that checks MM/DD/YYYY format, date validity, and ensures the date is not in the future.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch variables), fonts (Lato, Playpen Sans), border radii, shadows, accordion animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 3) for a trauma-informed mental health app featuring AI therapist 'Serenity', including architectural notes, required badge images, existing feature definitions, and their implementation status.
